name: M-200
events: 20 Jun 1944 While trying to attack a German convoy of the Syltefjord M-200 was spotted by a German aircraft after which the escort vessels dropped 33 depth charges, spoiling the subs attack.
15 Jul 1944 M-200 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 5000 tons in a German convoy of the Persfjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
